channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump holds affordable housing bill hostage over voter ID demand
item.description: "Today's Housing News Conference and Signing is hereby cancelled until we pass the SAVE AMERICA ACT," he said.

item.title: Sarah Jessica Parker, now worth $200M, credits her financially struggling childhood for her drive
item.description: Before playing Carrie Bradshaw, Parker says her family couldn't afford electricity, fueling her ambition and work ethic.

item.title: Trump's international student crackdown could cost the economy nearly $500 billion
item.description: Half of America's STEM PhD workers are foreign-born, and that talent pipeline is rapidly shrinking.

item.title: Home Depot uses AI to transform retail operations
item.description: Despite a challenging housing market, Home Depot has consistently invested in AI for both customers and employees.
